creator: matthias.pfaller@familie-pfaller.de
text:
I have set WANT_OPENLDAP_SASL in /etc/make.conf

When I build net/samba410 or net/nss-pam-ldapd without synth and without having openldap-sasl-client installed both ports will use openldap-sasl-client. 

When doing this using synth, they will build against openldap-client. 

This in turn will result in openldap-sasl-server getting uninstalled...

Is this a bug or a configuration error on my side?
